exhibits.name: Financial Statements

sub_exhibits.name: Audited Consolidated Financial Statements of Hyatt Hotels Corporation
sub_exhibits.content_summary: Guarantee of Performance (pp. 95-96), Deloitte & Touche auditor report (pp. 97-98), Consolidated income statement, comprehensive income, balance sheet, stockholders' equity, cash flows, and notes to financial statements for FY 2024/2023/2022

sub_exhibits.name: Form 8-K (filed March 26, 2025)
sub_exhibits.content_summary: SEC Form 8-K filing relating to Playa Hotels tender offer and other corporate matters

exhibits.notes: Parent company Hyatt Hotels Corporation guarantees franchisor performance absolutely and unconditionally. Auditor: Deloitte & Touche LLP (serving since 2003).

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Full franchise agreement template (Hyatt 2025 Template FA). Includes sub-exhibits A (definitions), B (development plan), B-1 (financial terms), B-3 (development timeline), C (right of first offer), D (management company rider), E (IT project management services), F (management company rider form), G (guaranty).

exhibits.name: Design and Construction Standards
exhibits.notes: Detailed design and construction specifications for new Brand Hotels, including FF&E manager requirements, schematic document requirements, and engineering standards.

exhibits.name: State Administrators/Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.pdf_pages: unconfirmed — may be embedded or omitted from text layer
exhibits.notes: Referenced in TOC and Item 1 but no clear cover page identified in text extraction. May be a very brief exhibit or embedded within Exhibit M state pages.

exhibits.name: System Standards Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for 3,641 pages of System Standards. Categories include: Owner/Operator Communications, Accounting, Brand Marketing, Colleague Learning, F&B, Front Office, Housekeeping, Loyalty, Revenue Management, Safety & Security, Sales, Spa, Technology.

exhibits.name: Confidentiality Agreement
exhibits.notes: Standard Hyatt confidentiality agreement (Hyatt 2025 CA). Must be signed during franchise evaluation process.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Current Brand Hotel franchisees as of December 31, 2024. States listed include Alaska (1 signed not open), Illinois (2), Louisiana (1), New York (2), Rhode Island (1).

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Left the System
exhibits.notes: Former Brand Hotel franchisees as of December 31, 2024. Contact information may be disclosed to future buyers.

exhibits.name: Hosting Services Agreement
exhibits.notes: PMS hosting services agreement (Hyatt 2025 Hosting Agmt). Includes Schedule 1 (service description) and Schedule 2 (maintenance schedule). Required for all franchisees using Opera PMS.

exhibits.name: Comfort Letter
exhibits.notes: Template comfort letter for lenders and other interest holders. Required from each Comfort Letter Party.

exhibits.name: Central Hotel Services by Hyatt Master Agreement
exhibits.notes: Master agreement for central hotel services with multiple program schedules: Field Marketing, Revenue Management Services, Central Sales Services, GPGS, Digital Ancillary Services. Generally non-mandatory but may be required under certain conditions.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Additional Disclosures and Riders
exhibits.notes: State-specific addenda including additional disclosures, riders to franchise agreement, and riders to confidentiality agreement. States covered likely include CA, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI. Also contains Hyatt Franchising, L.L.C. unaudited balance sheet (pp. 357-358).
